title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into and Sign in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños, in a Memorandum of Agreement with the Philippine Army, 564th Engineering Construction Batallion (ECB), 51st Engineering Brigade (EB), Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) to Use and Operate Its Backhoe (SAMSUNG) 45,000 Lbs, Capacity for the Lgu?s General Paciano Rizal Park Improvement Project and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 01/31/2020)
